coreIssue: This performance conversation is likely about how Taya’s senior-level coaching is translating into visible impact in the new university class.
openingQuestion: What changes have you seen in the new university class that make you feel your coaching is really moving people forward?
listenFor: whether she names a specific learner, cohort moment, or class shift instead of speaking only in general positives
whether she volunteers how learners or peer coaches responded to her feedback and what they did next
if they mention where she is still testing her approach or wants sharper input on how her coaching lands
avoid: do not turn a positive performance discussion into a vague praise session with no evidence or examples
do not jump straight into improvement points before grounding the conversation in what senior-level impact she is already creating
goodOutcome: You and Taya have agreed what senior Acting Coach impact looks like in this university class and one concrete example of coaching influence she should keep building on.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one specific example from the new university class where her coaching changed learner behaviour, class outcomes, or peer coach practice.
